hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])(rm|mv|git rm)[[:space:]].*ROADMAP'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".planning/ROADMAP.md is a protected artifact — deletion/move blocked by hook."}}\n'; fi

test -f "/Users/trekkie/projects/sentinel-of-mnemosyne/.planning/ROADMAP.md" && exit 0; echo 'CRITICAL: .planning/ROADMAP.md has been deleted! Restore: git checkout HEAD -- .planning/ROADMAP.md'; exit 2
